initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Examination ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01' AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Examination.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(Examination.Diagnosis) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Diagnosis
FROM Examination
JOIN Laboratory ON Examination.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01' AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Examination
JOIN Laboratory ON Examination.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01' AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Examination.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01'
  AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Examination.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Examination ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01'
  AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Examination.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(Examination.Diagnosis) DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Laboratory.Date >= '1985-01-01'
  AND Laboratory.Date <= '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Examination.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
